title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Merck India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Merck India
jsonLd.description:
Merck India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Merck India:
Merck India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India!
